blur_detection.description: The text and edges show moderate blur, likely due to camera movement or focus issues.
blur_detection.recommendation: Retake the image ensuring the camera is steady and focused properly.

contrast_assessment.description: The contrast between text and background is adequate but could be improved for better readability.
contrast_assessment.recommendation: Ensure even lighting and avoid shadows when capturing the document.

glare_identification.description: Minor glare is present in the top-right corner, slightly affecting readability.
glare_identification.recommendation: Adjust the angle of the camera to minimize reflections.

water_stains.description: No water stains are detected on the document.

tears_or_folds.description: No tears or folds are detected on the document.

cut_off_detection.description: A small portion of the bottom edge is slightly cut off.
cut_off_detection.recommendation: Ensure the entire document is within the frame when capturing the image.

missing_sections.description: No missing sections are detected on the document.

obstructions.description: No obstructions are detected on the document.

classification.reasoning: The document contains all necessary fields to classify it as an expense. It includes supplier details, consumer details, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice/receipt number, tax information, payment method, and item description/line items.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: All required fields are present, confirming this is an expense document.

issues.description: The date of issue on the receipt is in the future (2025-06-06), which is not acceptable.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Receipt must show the date when the expense occurred

issues.description: The receipt does not include details of departure point, destination, dates of travel as required for transportation expenses.
issues.recommendation: Please provide details of departure point, destination, and dates of travel.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Transportation cost invoices must include details of departure point, destination, dates of travel

issues.description: The receipt does not include the transport company details including Name of Bus, Tax code, Address of Headquarter as required for transportation expenses.
issues.recommendation: Please provide transport company details including Name of Bus, Tax code, Address of Headquarter.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Bus tickets must show Transport company details including Name of Bus, Tax code, Address of Headquarter

issues.description: The receipt does not include the boarding pass and flight ticket as required for flight expenses.
issues.recommendation: Please provide the boarding pass and flight ticket.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Air Ticket claims must include the Boarding Pass, the flight ticket and a red invoice

issues.description: The receipt does not include an itemized report as required for all expenses.
issues.recommendation: Please provide an itemized report along with clear receipts.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Expense submission must have an itemized report along with clear receipts

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has several compliance issues including a future date of issue, missing transportation details, missing transport company details, missing boarding pass and flight ticket, and missing itemized report. These issues need to be addressed to ensure compliance with the specified standards and policies.
